_comment: S.I.N.A Install Catalog — curated offline content and tools

items.name: Llama 3.2 (3B)
items.description: Meta's Llama 3.2 3B model — fast, capable, runs on modest hardware. Good all-around assistant.

items.name: Llama 3.2 (1B)
items.description: Llama 3.2 1B — smallest Llama model, minimal RAM required, good for embedded/low-resource systems.

items.name: Mistral 7B
items.description: Mistral AI's 7B model — excellent performance-to-size ratio, strong reasoning and instruction following.

items.name: Gemma 2 (2B)
items.description: Google's Gemma 2 2B — compact and capable, good for summarization and Q&A.

items.name: nomic-embed-text
items.description: Nomic's text embedding model — required for semantic search and RAG. Small and fast.

items.name: Wikipedia (English, Mini)
items.description: A compact English Wikipedia snapshot with articles only — no images. ~8GB compressed. Essential offline reference.

items.name: Project Gutenberg Selection
items.description: Curated selection of classic books from Project Gutenberg — literature, science, philosophy, history.

items.name: Canada Overview Map
items.description: Offline raster map tiles for all of Canada — overview zoom levels (0-8). Suitable for national-level navigation.
items.disabled_reason: Map tiles must be acquired manually from Geofabrik — see docs/DATA_LAYOUT.md

items.name: Ontario Detailed Map
items.description: Offline vector tiles for Ontario including roads, terrain, and points of interest. Zoom levels 0-14.
items.disabled_reason: Map tiles must be acquired manually from Geofabrik — see docs/DATA_LAYOUT.md

items.name: Toronto Detailed Map
items.description: High-detail offline map for Toronto and surrounding GTA. Street-level zoom (0-16).
items.disabled_reason: Map tiles must be acquired manually from Geofabrik — see docs/DATA_LAYOUT.md
